visualizations.title: The Unitary Formula Steps
visualizations.description: Divide to find the value of one unit, then multiply to find the value of the target units.

steps.explanation: Divide the initial value V1 by the initial number of units N1 to find unit value u.
Multiply the unit value u by the target number of units N2 to find final value V2.

visualizations.title: The Bag & Coin Model
visualizations.description: Watch how we determine the coin count for 7 bags by first figuring out the count inside 1 bag.
